use_cases: Displaying analytics data with animated bar charts in a modern glass-morphism card layout
Creating interactive dashboard widgets with hover-reveal tooltips
Showcasing statistics or metrics with layered 3D visual effects
Building modern SaaS product analytics interfaces
Presenting data in visually engaging card components with gradient overlays
ai_summary: A layered 3D glass-morphism card component featuring animated bar charts, gradient overlays, and interactive hover tooltip panels. The composite card structure includes specialized sub-components for body content, titles, descriptions, and visual displays. Supports dark mode with refined border and background styling for modern data visualization interfaces.
